title: Delicate Roasted Saudi Arabian Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional Saudi Arabian dish featuring roasted lamb, pomegranate, and a blend of spices, cooked to perfection in a copper pot. This recipe brings back nostalgic memories of Middle Eastern cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large copper pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the pomegranate juice, garlic, and parsley, and stir to combine.
Transfer the copper pot to the preheated air fryer and cook for 20 minutes.
Reduce the heat to 300 degrees Fahrenheit and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until the lamb is tender.
Remove the pot from the air fryer and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
